task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Samsung Galaxy Watch5 Pro (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $449.00 and wholesale is $314.00. Product features: Smartwatch with titanium case and 80-hour battery life. Reference: https://www.samsung.com/us/watches/galaxy-watch5-pro/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Samsung Galaxy Watch5 Pro. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Samsung Galaxy Watch5 Pro. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
